name: Laguna Honda Hospital
summary_en: Archive documents trace decades of planning at Laguna Honda Hospital and Rehabilitation Center, from a 1966 hospital cost-accounting report and Department of Public Health annual reports through the 1994 institutional master plan and the 2001-2002 hospital-replacement environmental impact and historic-background reports. The site is operated by Public Health (DPH), which carried an FY2025 budget of $3.2B. City payment records link two Mayor's Office contracts naming the location: "250 Laguna Honda" ($7.5M paid) and a "375 Laguna Honda Blvd Loan" ($1.4M paid).
